review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a critical component of security in K8s. The naming mostly follows conventions, but 'k8s_audit_log_storage_separation' was adjusted to better reflect the action of configuring external storage for audit logs. This aligns with the control's intent of storing logs on a different system to enhance security.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'external_storage_configured' to clearly indicate the configuration of audit logs to an external system.
title: Protection Of Audit Information - Protection of audit information | store on component with different operating sy
step1_reasoning: The control AU-9(7) focuses on the protection of audit information by storing it on a component with a different operating system, which can be interpreted in Kubernetes as ensuring audit logs are securely stored and protected from tampering. Kubernetes audit logs can be enabled and configured to be sent to an external system for storage, ensuring separation from the main cluster components. Additionally, ensuring the integrity and protection of these logs is crucial, which can be achieved through secure storage practices.
